name: fin-trade-extract-nosubs
initializeCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; ROOT="${localWorkspaceFolder}/.."; if [ ! -d "$ROOT/fred-database/.git" ]; then git clone https://github.com/kennydoit/fred-database "$ROOT/fred-database"; fi; if [ ! -d "$ROOT/fin-trade-extract/.git" ]; then git clone https://github.com/kennydoit/fin-trade-extract "$ROOT/fin-trade-extract"; fi'
